repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Organizational files from the co-publisher Matthew Blank.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: A weekly gay entertainment guide for New York City, 1991 to July 10, 2009, HX, titled Homo Xtra for a while, was available for free in bars and other locations, concentrated in the West Village and Chelsea and, during the summer, in the Pines and Cherry Grove. Its slogan was: "The totally biased, politically incorrect party paper".

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Organizational files from the co-publisher Matthew Blank.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Periodicals cataloged separately as part of the Human Sexuality Collection.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Homo Xtra (HX) records, #7840. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on our Reproductions & Permissions page.
